evals.name: keyword-filtering
evals.prompt: 帮我复现所有关于 Volvo Design Helper 组件重构的会话。分析其中的 UI 决策过程。
evals.expected_output: The agent should identify only Volvo-related sessions, list them, and ask for confirmation before analysis.

evals.name: default-selection
evals.prompt: 总结一下最近的编程会话，我想知道我在布局方案上的处理是否得当。
evals.expected_output: The agent should list recent sessions (both Volvo and Portfolio) and ask which ones to focus on before analysis.
